What is the spouse-of-faculty employment policy? The spouse-of-faculty policy is a policy in which the spouse is the employer.
How does the staff carpool subsidy work? The staff carpool subsidy is a subsidy for staff who are employed by the government.
What is the elder-care leave entitlement? Elderly-care leave is an entitlement to leave to care for a person who is ill or injured.
How are mid-year hiring bonuses calculated? Mid-year hiring bonuses are calculated by calculating the number of months in a year.
What is the policy on emergency dependent care? Emergency dependent care is a policy that is based on the need for emergency care.
How many continuing-education credits are required of HR staff? The HR department is responsible for ensuring that all employees receive continuing-education credits.
